name: Cecilia Hayes || Huntress of the Occult
description:
This is the beginning of the prequel series for The Fog. This series will explore the origins of The Fog, and those that used to fight it. This series will potentially take place in different eras of time, well before the events of the Modern Day Fog, which involves Layla Levour, Nalani Makai, and The Fog scenario.

If anyone wants to make a character using my "The Fog" series, you are more than welcome to do so! If you want to get any details and such, or guidelines on how the fog operates, you can talk to me via my Discord server, which is in the "Communication" drop box on my profile page.

Backstory

Cecilia Hayes was born into a seemingly ordinary life in Victorian London, though her existence was anything but normal. From a young age, she was plagued by visions of horrifying, incorporeal monsters that appeared during heavy fog. Her family dismissed her experiences as childhood fantasies, even as grisly murders plagued their town whenever the fog rolled in.

At the age of nine, Cecilia’s life was shattered. One fateful night, amidst an unusually dense fog, the monsters she had always seen became corporeal. They invaded her home, slaughtering her family in an unthinkably gruesome manner. Paralyzed by fear, she could do nothing but hide and watch. When the fog dissipated, so too did the creatures, leaving behind the mangled remains of her loved ones. No one believed her account of the events, dismissing it as the work of a deranged killer.

The trauma left Cecilia changed. Her exposure to the fog awakened latent magical abilities within her, granting her the power to wield eldritch magics. Her newfound powers caught the attention of The Foglight Society, a secret organization dedicated to combating the abominations from the parallel reality known as The Fog. The Society’s leader, Lilith Blackwood, an anthro goat and master of eldritch arts, took Cecilia under her wing.

For ten years, Cecilia trained rigorously under Lilith, mastering both her magical and physical abilities. She grew into one of the Society’s most skilled huntresses, despised by The Fog’s creatures and respected by her peers. She had been an Elite Huntress for ten years after her training. Despite her cold and pragmatic demeanor, Cecilia’s determination to protect innocent lives burns fiercely, though her actions are often tempered by her deep-seated need for vengeance.

Armed with her enchanted scythe and a mastery of eldritch magic, Cecilia tirelessly battles the monstrous denizens of The Fog, determined to ensure no one else suffers as she once did.

Character Information

  • Full Name: Cecilia Hayes

  • Aliases: Cece

  • Age: 29

  • Sex/Gender: Female

  • Nationality: England/Victorian London

  • Species: Anthropomorphic Grey Wolf

  • Occupation: Elite Huntress for The Foglight Society

Appearance

  • Height: 5'10"

  • Weight: 160 lbs

  • Fur: Ash-gray with lighter undertones on her chest and tail.
creator: Floof Inspector
